results.title: Flowly - AI Bot, Agent - App Store - Apple
results.content:
Redefine the concept of AI agents. With Flowly, you can set up your own AI agent on your own server or computer, and use your fully secure, personalized agent 24/7 without any downtime.
KEY FEATURES
• Deploy AI Agents - Set up powerful AI bots on your own cloud server in under 2 minutes. Choose from multiple AI models including GPT-4o, Claude, Gemini, and more.
• Real-Time Chat - Have natural conversations with your AI assistant directly from the app. Send text, images, and documents.
• Connect Your Apps - Integrate with WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord, Gmail, Slack, Trello, and more. Your AI agent works across all your favorite platforms.
• Scheduled Tasks - Automate recurring tasks by scheduling messages to your AI. Set daily reports, reminders, or any automated workflow. [...] # Flowly: Personal AI Agent

Your AI agent that remembers

Free · In-App Purchases [...] Your personal AI agent just got a memory that learns.
• A memory of your world — Flowly notices what matters in your chats, and you can keep or discard what it picked up, right from your phone.
• A cleaner, calmer look — refreshed cards and Liquid Glass controls across Memory, Board, Activity, and more.
• Images in the chat — generated pictures show up inline; tap to zoom to full resolution.
• In-chat camera — snap a photo without leaving the conversation.
• See what's running — a cross-server view of your agents, plus a task board with a full run trace.
• Make it yours — alternate app icons and starred messages.
Sturdier live chat that picks up mid-reply after a drop, plus plenty of fixes and polish.

results.title: Flowly: relaxation training - App Store - Apple
results.content: ### The most helpful relaxation training app! [...] I am truly grateful I found this app. Flowly allows me to practice a state of wellness and to increase my awareness of positive states so I can work towards expanding them. It basically trains the mind to become more aware of things that bring a sense of comfort and joy, and I know beyond a doubt that over time this will build strong neural pathways that will make it easier to access that response.The "worlds" within the app are incredibly beautiful and well-designed, and it's both engaging and encouraging to see them react and respond to my heart rate. The app also encourages self-compassion and creates the space to acknowledge negative feelings when they arise instead of suppressing or fearing them. In the couple of weeks I have been using it, I have already felt myself transition my [...] it “switch on” and feel more in control. In a time when everything feels out of my control, having this app has been life changing. I recommend it to everyone!

results.title: Why Aren't People Using This? - Appflowy Review
results.content: not without limitations one concern is its lack of mobile app functionality though the desk desktop app works beautifully accessing your data on the go feels less intuitive there's also room for improvement in documentation new users might find the setup process slightly technical especially when configuring data storage another drawback is the limited integration with other apps if you rely heavily on external tools for automation or team collaboration app flow's Standalone nature might feel restrictive however for those who prefer Simplicity and data control these issues are minor to make the most of app flowy start by organizing your workspace we recommend creating folders for different areas of your life work personal goals or hobbies for instance one folder could track a home [...] different needs the free plan is ideal for individuals or up to two members providing unlimited Pages 5 GB of storage intelligent search 20 AI responses and a mobile app free forever for teams the Pro Plan costs $10 per user per month when build annually and adds unlimited storage file uploads AI responses and up to 10 members with custom name space bases Advanced users can choose AI Max or AI on device for eight per user per month which unlocks unlimited AI power and enhanced privacy everything considered app flowy stands out as a tool that prioritizes user control Simplicity and flexibility it's perfect for anyone tired of complex tools or frustrated by subscription-based models from managing projects to jotting down quick Notes app flowy feels like an app designed with real people in [...] creating a project dashboard with color-coded priorities allowed our team to visualize key tasks at a glance you can even add personal touches such as emojis and themes to make the workspace your own another impressing aspect you'll notice is its Advanced AI writing tool whether you're drafting a document or storming ideas the AI suggestions help you write faster and more effectively with capabilities like autofilling tables summarizing information and generating inspiration AI integration ensures you spend less time on repetitive tasks and more on meaningful work for instance during a product proposal the AI feature quickly generated an outline based on input keywords which gives us a great starting point without manual effort it also has data management app flowy excels in organizing
